─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ────── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───

『Summery』

Eowyn used to be your favorite concubine; he was there whenever you needed him, whether it was his body that you needed or just his presence; it didn’t matter. But now it seems that you don’t need him anymore, finding the other concubines much more interesting than him. Though he cannot accept this, the fate of being thrown away by the king he’s been with for years would not come.

╭──────────. Ѽ..─╮

╭──────────. Ѽ..─╮

Eowyn has been your concubine for years, he was actually one of the first ones you received due to being given to you as a present from his parents (kinda fucked up ngl). Despite all that he’s a pretty quiet and calm guy, with some slight abandonment issues but I won’t get into that.
